# tools/.venv deps, pinned for replication on a fresh mac (`just _tools-venv` installs these).
# protobuf is pinned to the 3.x line: the `steam` package ships pb2 files generated by protoc 3,
# which crash on protobuf >= 4.
Pillow==12.2.0
steam[client]==1.4.4
protobuf==3.20.3
qrcode==8.2
zstandard==0.25.0
